speaker: buyer

args.message: Thanks! First, I wanted to ask if the Sienna has been in any accidents?

text: Thanks! First, I wanted to ask if the Sienna has been in any accidents?

speaker: seller

args.message: Accidents? This beauty? Never! She's been babied since day one, and you can tell. Only driven on Sundays to church, you know? That Carfax report is clean as a whistle, just like this paint. Ready for its next adventure!

text: Accidents? This beauty? Never! She's been babied since day one, and you can tell. Only driven on Sundays to church, you know? That Carfax report is clean as a whistle, just like this paint. Ready for its next adventure!

speaker: buyer

args.message: That's good to hear. Could you tell me more about the recent inspection? What was covered, and do you have any records of it?

text: That's good to hear. Could you tell me more about the recent inspection? What was covered, and do you have any records of it?

speaker: seller

args.message: Oh, absolutely! We just had our top mechanic give it a thorough once-over. Checked the fluids, brakes, tires – the whole nine yards. Everything checked out perfectly. They even gave it a clean bill of health for the next 10,000 miles! You won't find any service records from us, per company policy, but trust me, it's road-ready. We wouldn't put a car on the lot that wasn't tip-top!

args.message: Ah, you're a savvy shopper, I like that! Always good to do your homework. So, what did the inspection reveal? I'm sure it just confirmed what we already know – this Sienna is a gem. gem. . well, it's a Toyota Sienna! Built Ford Tough!
